section.title: AI-First Approach
section.subtitle: Agentic Coding & AI Projects
section.description: We build products and solutions with an AI-first mindset: from agentic development workflows to full AI-powered applications. We don't just use AI tools—we design systems and products where AI is at the core.

pillars.title: AI-First Projects
pillars.description: We design and deliver projects where AI is a first-class citizen: intelligent features, ML pipelines, and product decisions driven by data and models from day one.
highlights: Product strategy with AI in mind

pillars.title: Agentic Coding
pillars.description: We adopt agentic development: AI-assisted coding, autonomous tool use, and human-in-the-loop workflows that accelerate delivery without sacrificing quality.

pillars.title: AI Product Development
pillars.description: We ship AI products: chatbots, copilots, recommendation systems, and custom AI solutions tailored to your domain and users.

cta.text: Want to build AI-first or agentic with us?
